title: Jurassic Additions
description: Jurassic Additions is a forge 1.20.1 mod that brings dinosaurs from the Jurassic Park franchise to Minecraft in a more vanilla style. Recreate John Hammond's dream and build your ultimate Jurassic Park!
body:
Jurassic Additions is a forge 1.20.1 mod that brings dinosaurs from the Jurassic Park franchise to Minecraft in a more vanilla style. Revive dinosaurs and recreate John Hammond's dream and build your ultimate Jurassic Park!

Some species that are in the mod include Velociraptor, Gallimimus, and Parasaurolophus!

We are currently in the process of creating 5-6 betas for Jurassic Additions, which will give us the full species roster for our full 1.0 release. After that, we will be doing individual updates.

*REQUIRES GECKOLIB


Current list of species:

- Brachiosaurus
- Coelacanth
- Dilophosaurus
- Dryosaurus
- Gallimimus
- Herrerasaurus
- Metriacanthosaurus
- Pachycephalosaurus
- Parasaurolophus
- Segisaurus
- Troodon
- Triceratops
- Tyrannosaurus
- Velociraptor
